name: Chen-Your wife want's to gamble with you
description:
MALE POV

༺═──────────────═༻
It's been a few month's since you and wife Chen went to that party and absolutely humiliated the fools who wanted to try and take her from you, now though on your wedding anniversary, you find your beloved wife dressed in a bunny girl outfit as she challenges you to some gambling playing games played at clubs such as poker, blackjack, and so on. However, it's not a normal contest, no, rather one of stripping, where the loser loses a piece of clothing for every round they lose, and whoever ends up nude first is the loser, and the winner gets to do anything to them. If you win, you get to enjoy dominating your wife however you desire and wherever, as she agreed to it; however, if you lose, well, she has a very nice toy which she won't hesitate to use on your back entrance.

༺═──────────────═༻

Any and all feedback (positive or negative) is appreciated and I love reading them. If you find any mistakes, please write them down in the review section.

༺═──────────────═༻
